feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: UAE eInvoicing - Company Code set up for Group Tax entities - VAT TRN & Additional Parameters
entry.content:
We have 2 UAE INTRA-GROUP company codes with same UAE VAT Group Tax Registration Number TRN. Example 100111111100001 

These 2 company codes have different UAE VAT Corporate Tax TRNs and TINs.

UAE VAT Group Tax Registration Number TRN 100111111100001

Company Code UAE1:

  • UAE VAT Corporate Tax TRN 100222222200002
  • TIN 1002222222
  • Trade License 444

Company Code UAE2:

  • UAE VAT Corporate Tax TRN 100333333300003
  • TIN 1003333333
  • Trade License 555

 

Question for T001-STCEG for each company code

In T001/STCEG we have maintained so far:  

  • UAE1 – 100111111100001  (for some reason we have maintained the Group Tax TRN in the initial GoLive a few years ago).
  • UAE2 – empty (for some reason we have maintained value empty in the initial GoLive a few years ago).

For the eInvoicing implementation, should we adjust them accordingly to:

  • UAE1 - 100222222200002 ?
  • UAE2 – 100333333300003 ?

 

Information for Parameter Types in Company Codes

Parameter types should be as follows based on:

Maintaining Additional Parameters for Company Code | SAP Help Portal

UAE1

  • AELRID – TL:444
  • AELRAC – ie. Dubai Integrated Economic Zones Authority
  • SAPAE1 (TIN) - 1002222222

UAE2

  • AELRID – TL:555
  • AELRAC – ie. Dubai Integrated Economic Zones Authority
  • SAPAE1 (TIN) - 1003333333

Reference: Page 22 of Webinar 2 presentation (9.4.2026)

SAP UAE eInviocing - webinar -April 9 2026.pdf

entry.title: Idoc error
entry.content: On an intercompany invoice idoc errors and says delivery does not exist

entry.title: V_EDSDC recording routine changed after upgrade
entry.content:
Dear Experts. 

After system upgrade, we have noticed, that the view V_EDSDC has been changed to use the "Standard recording routine". As a result, it now strictly requires a customizing transport request whenever a change is made.

Do you have any idea what can be done do revert this setting and be able to manage data without transport?

I have found something about changing the 'Current Settings' in the SOBJ.
But will it work for non-production environments? According to the SAP Help, it only works in production clients.

We need to be able to change the data without transport throughout the entire landscape (including DEV and QA).

Thank you very much for any help.  It will be appreciated 😊👍
Veronika

entry.title: Article in POD status is ECC has to be cleared. (290202)
entry.content:
Article ADR80680282  shows a quantity in ECC in storage bin POD.

There is no open Deliveries and the last movement on this article was 12-15-2016.

Our goal is,  to have this Article for a quantity of 2 removed from ECC completely from Site 8005.
This is not even an active SKU anymore.

entry.title: Change in the sender email id while sending payment advice to vendors in payment run F110.
entry.content:
We would like to change the sender email address used while sending Payment Advice emails to vendors.

Currently, the sender email ID is being picked up from the user who executes the payment run. However, our requirement is to send all Payment Advice emails from a default/common email ID irrespective of the user performing the payment run.

Kindly advise the necessary steps or settings required to achieve the same.

entry.title: Suitable Practice System for GUI based ABAP development
entry.content:
Hi fellow SAP Learners and Developers,

I am Shakthi Pranesh, and recently I got verified and got access to SAP Learning Hub Student edition subscription, and I am utilise it to learn ABAP development.

I am able to find the practice systems for ABAP development for S/HANA, ADT and RAP.

The problem I am facing is, I could not find a suitable Practice System for GUI based ABAP development, I need GUI to learn few things from it and I wish to do some experiments and practice in that system.

So please help me to find the right practice system at SAP Learning Hub which suitable for GUI based ABAP development, if you already know any please let me know.

Thanks in Advance for your help.

entry.title: Price Group Condition ZA00 not working
entry.content: P80-658: group Pricing not working ZA00 condition

entry.title: Bex report key figures header text is changing when the language is changed
entry.content: When the language is changing to Spanish the FTQ report header key figure description is changing to selection1, selection2 form4 and form5. The expectation is that key figure description still needs to be shown in English language only. It is correctly working in production system. whereas it is not working in nonproduction system (BQ2). I have attached the issue details.

entry.title: Bex report key figures header text is changing when the language is changed
entry.content: During the execution of Bex report (FTQ report) in portal when the user changes the language to Spanish, key figure descriptions are converting to selection1, selection2 form4 and form5. The expectation of the business user is that key figure description still needs to be shown in English language only. It is correctly working in production system. whereas it is not working in nonproduction system (BQ2). I have attached the issue details.

entry.title: Freight Condition ZHD0 not distributing to all lines on Invoice
entry.content:
We have a Freight Condition getting updated on delivery header directly . It is coming from interface.

When the invoice is created with reference to delivery, the entire freight value sits on the last time of the invoice. (Please note I am not referring to rounding value but entire freight value)

When the credit memo is created only for the last time, then seems like we are giving the entire freight value back to customer instead of the proportionate value, which is wrong and when credit memo is created for other lines, then there is no credit given to customer for freight. 

However, when we put  Freight condition type on the sales order, then we see that it distributes the freight across all lines. Same information is passed to delivery/invoice. 

And when the credit memo is created for a specific line item, then the proportionate freight is given to customer, which is right. 

I dont think so there is a config issue with condition type as it is same being used on order & delivery. 

So, can you please confirm if this is how SAP Standard works and if there is a way to distribute the freight on all the lines on the invoice if the freight is polulated on delivery directly.

entry.title: Asset Accoutning is going live in 2026, however there are some assets which were purchased in 2025.
entry.content:
Asset accounting set up is done in 2026 and is going live in Jun 2026.  There are some assets purchased in 2025 and want them to capitalize in 2026 however the depreciation start date would be 2025. I have proposed Asset migration procedure.  The Assets should be created by using AS91 Tcode and post the APC and Accumulated depreciation till Dec 2025 via Take over values option and post a manual journal entry.  Below is the proposed entry :

Asst Account Dr

Accumulated Depreciation Account Cr

Asset Migration account Cr.

After posting the above entry the balance which is laying in Asset Migration account, I have proposed to move asset migration account balances to retained earnings account.

However, client is asking a different approach.  Client is saying instead of the above process.  Capitalize the assets using AS01, the capitalization date should be 23rd April 2025 and depreciation start should be 23rd Aprils 2025 and post the entire depreciation from April 2025 to May 2026 in Jun 2026 depreciation run.  Is this approach doable?  If yes, how?

entry.title: No Search help for 'Incoterm Location 1' field INCO2_L in S4 HANA for PO Item
entry.content:
No values for 'Incoterm Location1' field in PO Item level in S4 HANA.

In ECC it was there.

entry.title: Request for RLM document ECC to S/4 HANA.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our Company is currently evaluating the migration from ECC to S/4 HANA. As part of this assessment, we are analyzing the key differences and compatibility between the two systems.

Could you please provide any supporting documentation to Remote Logistics management that outlines the changes, enhancements or differences between ECC and S/4 HANA.

Your support would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks and Regards,

Tejaswi Thota.

entry.title: The new DMEE format IT_CGI_XML_CT Italy new legal requirement ISO20022 in ECC system.
entry.content: Business requested to implement the new DMEE format IT_CGI_XML_CT which is specific to Italy New legal requirement ISO20022 in ECC. Currently the standard CGI_XML_CT is assigned to IT country which needs to be replaced by IT_CGI_XML_CT. Kindly advise if any SAP notes needs to be implemented to have this standard DMEE format (IT_CGI_XML_CT) in ECC system.

entry.title: SAP PR1 - Finished Goods Inventory Clearing Multiple plants
entry.content: We have received an request from user that the quantity was showing in MD04 transaction for the PO's. when we checked these are of old PO's 7802393236 , 7804586318 and the stock was in transit for these PO. can you please sugguest a solution for removing the stock from the MD04 as it is required to clear for Aduit purpose

entry.title: QPR4 - is not displaying WorkCentre in the Output
entry.content: QPR4 has work center field in ALV output, but it is not displaying any values. may we know display the work center ?

entry.title: SAP PR1 - Finished Goods Inventory Clearing Multiple plants
entry.content: We have received an request from user that the quantity was showing in MD04 transaction for the PO's. when we checked these are of old PO's 7802393236 , 7804586318 and the stock was in transit for these PO. can you please sugguest a solution for removing the stock from the MD04 as it is required to clear for Aduit purpose

entry.title: Need to complete Sales order inVA02
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Need to complete sales orders which have incompleteness with Shipping point and net value as the feilds are greyed out in VA02 so we are not able to complete the orders.So many incomplete orders are there in V.02 since 2006 and it is affecting the performance of the report.
Could you please suggest further.

entry.title: error transaction INTRASALES- SAP
entry.content:
Business Scenario

T Code VEFU

During Intrastat reporting, we have scenarios where Credit Memo and Debit Memo billing documents need to be linked to the corresponding original invoice for reporting purposes. However, in certain cases, the material/article referenced in the Credit Memo or Debit Memo differs from the material/article in the original invoice.

As a result, the expected linkage between the adjustment document and the original invoice is not established in the Intrastat work file records.

Clarification Required

Could you please confirm:

  1. Does standard SAP ECC provide functionality to manually link a Credit Memo or Debit Memo to an original invoice for Intrastat reporting purposes when the material/article references are different? If yes, is there any standard transaction (e.g., VEFU or any other Foreign Trade / Intrastat transaction) that allows maintenance of the following Intrastat reference fields:
    • IREFBELEG (Reference Document)
    • IREFPOSIT (Reference Item)
    • IREFMONAT (Reference Month)
    • IREFEJAHR (Reference F

entry.title: Standardformular FPAYM_DE_DTAZV ist unvollständig
entry.content:
Guten Tag sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,

bei der Umstellung des Formates DTAZV auf pain 001.001.09 (XML-basierte Datei), stellten wir fest, daß das alte SAP-Standardformular  FPAYM_DE_DTAZV unvollständig ist - siehe Anhang. Gibt es ein neueres Formular für DTA-Begleitschreiben?

Oder wird das alte überarbeitet?

Für weitere Fragen, stehe ich gerne zur Verfügung.

Danke und Gruß

Eugen Lutz
